hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|jsonc|md)$' | grep -F "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/" | xargs -r deno fmt 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' | grep -F "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/" | xargs -r deno lint 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx)$' | grep -F "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/" | xargs -r -n1 deno check 2>/dev/null || true
